markdownRemark.html:
Components

  • General Programming - Notes about general programming and things that are constant amongst all types of software development
  • Web Apps - Notes about everything related to web development (static and dynamic)

Important Principles

  • When you get stuck on any projects, first work on the problem for 20-30 minutes, then IMMEDIATELY ask for help

    • Places to ask for help:

      • Directly raise issue on the GitHub repo (Example: gatsbyjs/gatsby)

        • Gatsby Discord server
      • StackOverflow (StackExchange)
      • Reddit Programming
      • Dev.to
